name: Clown Crew Finale
desc: If you control a Tribute Summoned monster: Discard any number of cards, then target that many face-up cards on the field; destroy them. You can banish this card from your GY and Tribute 1 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, Pendulum, or Link Monster from your hand or field; add 1 "Clown Crew" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand whose original Level/Rank/Link Rating is not equal to the Tributed monster's. You can only use each effect of "Clown Crew Finale" once per turn.
